response.original_title: De La Connaissance à La Joie Philippe Guillemant
response.overview: This film was constructed from carefully selected excerpts from the 22 major themes of Philippe Guillemant's Masterclass, 20 hours of filmed instruction delivered over several months. Philippe Guillemant is not a personal development speaker. He is a physicist, a former senior research engineer at the CNRS (French National Centre for Scientific Research), who has dedicated thirty years to exploring the interplay between scientific rigor and the most intimate realms of human experience.
response.title: De La Connaissance à La Joie Philippe Guillemant
